lenses.description: The longest prime in Canon's CN-E Cinema Prime set, a full-frame telephoto for tight portraits and detail with strong subject isolation. It renders with Canon's clean, sharp look and rounded bokeh from an eleven-blade iris, holding edge-to-edge brightness across the frame. Manual focus with a smooth stepless throw and a shared front diameter, gear positions and form factor for fast, matched swaps. It covers full-frame and Super 35 to 4K-grade standards and colour-matches the CN-E primes.

lenses.description: A fast constant-T1.7 Super 35 zoom in Canon's Flex Zoom series, bright enough to intercut with fast primes over a 2.5x range. The T-stop stays constant across the zoom, with an eleven-blade iris, 8K-grade optics and the warm, colour-matched Cinema EOS rendering and reduced breathing. With the separate relay kit it converts to the full-frame 20-50mm T2.4 Flex Zoom, and its shared front diameter and gear positions make swaps within the Flex family quick. Available in interchangeable EF and PL mounts.

sources.hasFocusBreathing: Canon + AbelCine: "designed to minimize focus breathing" (tier-1/2)
sources.gearPitch: AbelCine: "0.8 pitch follow focus gearing" (tier-2)

lenses.description: The widest prime in Canon's CN-E Cinema Prime set, an ultra wide-angle for expansive establishing shots and tight interiors on full-frame sensors. It renders with Canon's clean, sharp look and edge-to-edge brightness, with natural rounded bokeh from an eleven-blade iris. Manual focus with a long, smooth stepless throw and a shared front diameter, gear positions and form factor across the set for fast, geared swaps. Built to 4K-grade standards, it covers full-frame and Super 35 and colour-matches the rest of the CN-E primes.

lenses.description: A wide-angle Super 35 cinema zoom with a constant T2.8 across its 3x range, matched to the 30-105mm T2.8 as a lightweight two-lens set. Fluorite and large aspherical elements keep it sharp and hold breathing to near zero, and it is parfocal, maintaining focus through the zoom without centre-axis drift. An eleven-blade iris gives smooth rounded bokeh, and the light 4K-grade build suits handheld and documentary work. It shares a 114mm front and 105mm filter thread with its 30-105 sibling.

sources.hasFocusBreathing: Canon CNE Compact Servo 18-80mm: minimal focus breathing via servo compensation (tier-1)

lenses.description: A compact, lightweight Super 35 servo zoom with a constant T4.4 across its range, one half of Canon's Compact-Servo pair with the 70-200mm T4.4. It was Canon's first cine-style lens with image stabilization and autofocus support on Cinema EOS bodies, and it is parfocal in both manual and autofocus modes. A nine-blade iris gives rounded bokeh, and a detachable servo grip or standard controllers drive zoom, focus and iris, making it well suited to run-and-gun, live and remote use. It threads for 77mm screw-in filters behind a removable sunshade.

sources.hasFocusBreathing: Canon + AbelCine: "designed to minimize focus breathing" (tier-1/2)

lenses.description: A fast wide-angle prime in Canon's CN-E Cinema Prime set, a flexible focal length for interiors, landscapes and wider coverage. Opening wide for low light and shallow depth of field, it keeps Canon's clean, sharp rendering with natural rounded bokeh from an eleven-blade iris. Manual focus with a smooth stepless throw and a front diameter, gear positions and form factor shared across the set for fast swaps. It covers full-frame and Super 35 to 4K-grade standards and colour-matches the CN-E primes.

lenses.description: The standard-to-telephoto half of Canon's lightweight Compact Cinema Zoom pair, a constant-T2.8 Super 35 zoom matched to the 15.5-47mm T2.8. It is parfocal with near-perfect geometry and very low breathing, holding focus through the zoom, and fluorite and aspherical elements keep it sharp across 4K. An eleven-blade iris gives smooth rounded bokeh, and it shares the 114mm front and 105mm filter thread with the 15.5-47. Light enough for handheld and run-and-gun work while matching the cine set.

lenses.description: The telephoto companion to the 14-35 in Canon's Flex Zoom series, a fast constant-T1.7 Super 35 zoom that also intercuts with fast primes over a 3x range. The aperture stays constant across the zoom, with an eleven-blade iris and 8K-grade colour-matched optics with reduced breathing. It converts to the full-frame 45-135mm T2.4 Flex Zoom with the relay kit, and shares gears and front diameter with the rest of the Flex Zooms. Available in interchangeable EF and PL mounts.

lenses.description: A fast wide-to-normal prime in Canon's CN-E Cinema Prime set, close to a versatile everyday angle of view. It opens wide for low-light work while holding Canon's clean, sharp look and rounded bokeh from an eleven-blade iris. Manual focus with a smooth stepless throw and a shared front diameter, gear positions and form factor for quick, matched swaps. Full-frame and Super 35 coverage at 4K-grade sharpness, colour-matched across the set.

sources.hasFocusBreathing: Canon + AbelCine: "designed to minimize focus breathing" (tier-1/2)

lenses.description: The fastest prime in Canon's CN-E Cinema Prime set, a standard focal length near natural perspective. Its bright aperture excels in low light and gives shallow depth of field, with clean, sharp Canon rendering and rounded bokeh from an eleven-blade iris. Manual focus with a smooth stepless throw and a shared front diameter, gear positions and form factor across the set for fast swaps. It covers full-frame and Super 35 to 4K-grade standards and colour-matches the CN-E primes.

lenses.description: The telephoto half of Canon's Compact-Servo pair, a light Super 35 servo zoom with a constant T4.4 matched to the 18-80mm T4.4. It carries image stabilization and autofocus support on Cinema EOS bodies and is a true parfocal design that holds focus through the zoom. A nine-blade iris gives rounded bokeh, and small side buttons plus standard controllers or the optional grip handle the servo zoom for live, jib and remote setups. It shares the compact form, 77mm filter thread and handling of its 18-80 sibling.

sources.hasFocusBreathing: Canon + AbelCine: "designed to minimize focus breathing" (tier-1/2)

lenses.description: A fast portrait-length prime in Canon's CN-E Cinema Prime set, well suited to close-ups and strong subject separation. Its bright aperture delivers shallow depth of field and low-light headroom, with Canon's clean, sharp look and smooth rounded bokeh from an eleven-blade iris. Manual focus with a smooth stepless throw; shared front diameter, gear positions and form factor let it swap cleanly with the CN-E 24 and 50 and the rest of the set. Full-frame and Super 35 coverage at 4K-grade sharpness, colour-matched across the set.

lenses.description: Canon's fast constant-aperture ultra-wide L zoom, a staple run-and-gun wide on EF cinema bodies and adapted mirrorless rigs. The f/2.8 aperture and full-frame coverage make it a practical single-lens wide for documentary and event work where swapping primes is not an option. No stabilization, and some edge softness and distortion are the trade for speed and range.

A common documentary and B-roll wide on Canon cinema bodies.
